resources.string: Paste a YouTube or Google Drive link below
Reads on-screen layout to keep Watch Together sessions in sync with friends and family. Does not record video or audio. Only active when you enable it in Accessibility settings.
Sync your screen with friends and family — watch videos together, stay in perfect sync, on Wi‑Fi or mobile data.
Watch Together reads what\'s on your screen (like playback position) so everyone stays in sync. It never records video or audio — and only runs when you turn it on.
Your privacy: we never record video, audio, or keystrokes outside your session. Screen reading only happens while Watch Together is enabled — turn it off anytime in Settings.
Android requires Accessibility permission so Watch Together can read screen layout for sync. You choose when it\'s active.

1. Tap Enable Watch Together below
2. Settings opens — find "Watch Together"
3. Turn the switch ON
4. Return to this app
You\'ll turn on Watch Together so sessions stay in sync. Find Watch Together in the list, switch it ON, then come back here.
Typing is saved automatically while Watch Together is on.
Auto-saved from keyboard and remote typing during your session.
Nothing saved yet.\n\nNotes appear here when you type on the phone or from the website remote keyboard.
This removes all saved notes from this phone.
Scanning and tapping Allow / OK dialogs…
Could not complete — check Watch Together is ON
